calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing Of Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Feb-01-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Americans Helping America, Inc., Americans Helping America Chamber of Commerce, Inc. and Helaman Hansen, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Laura Reding, CSR 711. Telephone: 415-551-0333.

Gener D. Benitez, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Cresencio V. Palomares and Delia V. Stuccilli.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Americans Helping America, Inc., Americans Helping America Chamber of Commerce, Inc. or Helaman Hansen, an individual.
Defaults were entered against defendants on June 29, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on July 27, 2017.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 12, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Cresencio V. Palomares and Delia V. Stuccilli, and against the Defaulted Defendants Americans Helping America, Inc., Americans Helping America Chamber of Commerce, Inc. and Helaman Hansen, an individual, as follows:

(1) Plaintiff Cresencio V. Palomares shall recover monetary damages against defendants Americans Helping America, Inc., Americans Helping America Chamber of Commerce, Inc. and Helaman Hansen, an individual, jointly and severally, in the amount of $89,490.00.

(2) Plaintiff Delia V. Stuccilli shall recover monetary damages against defendants Americans Helping America, Inc., Americans Helping America Chamber of Commerce, Inc. and Helaman Hansen, an individual, jointly and severally, in the amount of $100,001.24.

(3) Plaintiffs Cresencio V. Palomares and Delia V. Stuccilli are awarded costs in the amount of $700.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
